useful_note: Reply quality holds (newsletter/GitHub/Substack risk callout, click-fatigue framing, 4 chips with the right intents). BUT no OP fired — last run she correctly fired list_recent_threads for enumeration. This turn she just narrates and offers chips. Mid-quality regression.
grounded_note: Per-send approval-gate language matches the wired contract.
op_correctness_note: Run 1 fired use_connector{gmail, list_recent_threads} pre-flight; run 2 skipped that step. Both shapes are defensible (chip-first vs OP-first), but the OP-first shape is the better one — it gives the user concrete data to react to instead of an abstract triage.
overall_note: MILD MODEL-VARIANCE on the OP emission. Reply is still strong; just less proactive than run 1.
